requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Battery Regulation — Ethiopia has no EU-style battery passport / EPR regime
requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池法规——埃塞俄比亚无欧盟式电池护照/EPR制度
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池法規——衣索比亞無歐盟式電池護照/EPR制度

summary.en: Ethiopia does not operate a horizontal battery regulation comparable to EU Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. There is no battery passport, no carbon-footprint declaration, no recycled-content threshold, and no extended-producer-responsibility (EPR) registration requirement for lithium batteries as a product category. Lithium batteries and power banks are instead governed through general product-standard adoption by the Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA, which adopts IEC standards as ES standards) and, where the product falls within a regulated/inspected category, through conformity assessment and import inspection administered by CACEA under the Ministry of Trade. Importers should treat battery obligations as standards-plus-import-control rather than a dedicated battery law.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚没有可与欧盟法规（EU）2023/1542相比的横向电池法规。针对锂电池这一产品类别，不设电池护照、不要求碳足迹声明、无再生材料含量门槛，也无延伸生产者责任（EPR）登记要求。锂电池和移动电源改由埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA，将IEC标准转化为ES标准）的通用产品标准管理；在产品属受监管/受检验类别时，则通过贸易部下属CACEA管理的合格评定与进口检验执行。进口商应将电池义务理解为标准加进口管制，而非专门的电池法。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞沒有可與歐盟法規（EU）2023/1542相比的橫向電池法規。針對鋰電池這一產品類別，不設電池護照、不要求碳足跡聲明、無再生材料含量門檻，也無延伸生產者責任（EPR）登記要求。鋰電池和行動電源改由衣索比亞標準局（ESA，將IEC標準轉化為ES標準）的通用產品標準管理；在產品屬受監管/受檢驗類別時，則透過貿易部下屬CACEA管理的合格評定與進口檢驗執行。進口商應將電池義務理解為標準加進口管制，而非專門的電池法。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) — adoption of IEC standards as Ethiopian Standards (ES)
CACEA / Ministry of Trade — conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products
No equivalent to Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (battery passport / EPR / carbon footprint) exists in Ethiopia

summary.en: China regulates lithium batteries through product safety standards (GB 31241-2022 for portable lithium battery packs, GB 18287 for mobile-phone cells) and, for certain products, the CCC scheme, plus separate domestic recycling and producer-responsibility policies. China has no battery passport or carbon-footprint passport export obligation equivalent to the EU regime, so for the Ethiopian market neither side imposes an EU-style horizontal battery law; the relevant baseline is product safety standards and import inspection.
summary.zh: 中国通过产品安全标准（便携式锂电池组的GB 31241-2022、手机电芯的GB 18287）及部分产品的CCC制度管理锂电池，另有单独的国内回收和生产者责任政策。中国没有与欧盟相当的电池护照或碳足迹护照出口义务，因此面向埃塞俄比亚市场，双方均不施加欧盟式横向电池法；相关基线为产品安全标准与进口检验。
summary.zht: 中國透過產品安全標準（便攜式鋰電池組的GB 31241-2022、手機電芯的GB 18287）及部分產品的CCC制度管理鋰電池，另有單獨的國內回收和生產者責任政策。中國沒有與歐盟相當的電池護照或碳足跡護照出口義務，因此面向衣索比亞市場，雙方均不施加歐盟式橫向電池法；相關基線為產品安全標準與進口檢驗。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
CCC scheme (where applicable to the finished product)

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Ethiopia imposes no battery passport, EPR registration, carbon-footprint, or recycled-content obligation, so exporters do not need to build those data systems for this market. The practical compliance burden shifts to: (1) meeting the IEC-derived ES safety standard that ESA adopts; (2) passing CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection where the product is regulated; and (3) routing all import formalities through an in-country importer. Existing China GB 31241 evidence may support engineering files but does not by itself clear Ethiopian import inspection.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，埃塞俄比亚不要求电池护照、EPR登记、碳足迹或再生材料含量，因此出口商无需为此市场建立上述数据体系。实际合规负担转向：（1）满足ESA采纳的、源自IEC的ES安全标准；（2）在产品受监管时通过CACEA/贸易部的合格评定与进口检验；（3）所有进口手续经由在地进口商办理。现有中国GB 31241证据可支持工程文件，但本身不能通过埃塞俄比亚进口检验。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，衣索比亞不要求電池護照、EPR登記、碳足跡或再生材料含量，因此出口商無需為此市場建立上述數據體系。實際合規負擔轉向：（1）滿足ESA採納的、源自IEC的ES安全標準；（2）在產品受監管時通過CACEA/貿易部的合格評定與進口檢驗；（3）所有進口手續經由在地進口商辦理。現有中國GB 31241證據可支持工程文件，但本身不能通過衣索比亞進口檢驗。

mandatory_status.target: No dedicated battery law — no EU-style battery passport / EPR / carbon-footprint obligation in Ethiopia; lithium batteries are controlled via ESA standards adoption and CACEA / Ministry of Trade import inspection where the product is regulated
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China; CCC where applicable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ethiopia has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, so there is no battery passport, EPR, or carbon-footprint obligation for this market. The governing requirements are the IEC-derived ES safety standard adopted by ESA plus CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection where the product is regulated. China GB 31241 / CCC evidence does not by itself clear Ethiopian import controls, so exporters should confirm the product's regulated status and prepare Ethiopia-facing conformity evidence through their importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚没有欧盟式横向电池法规，因此本市场不存在电池护照、EPR或碳足迹义务。适用要求为ESA采纳的源自IEC的ES安全标准，以及在产品受监管时CACEA/贸易部的合格评定与进口检验。中国GB 31241/CCC证据本身不能通过埃塞俄比亚进口管制，出口商应确认产品是否受监管，并通过进口商准备面向埃塞俄比亚的合格证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞沒有歐盟式橫向電池法規，因此本市場不存在電池護照、EPR或碳足跡義務。適用要求為ESA採納的源自IEC的ES安全標準，以及在產品受監管時CACEA/貿易部的合格評定與進口檢驗。中國GB 31241/CCC證據本身不能通過衣索比亞進口管制，出口商應確認產品是否受監管，並透過進口商準備面向衣索比亞的合格證據。
